## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test / CI
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

Describe what you ran to validate the change.

```bash
# Example
# ./gradlew test
# npm test
# npm run lint
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I have signed off my commits (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets or credentials were introduced
